translations.note: 人名；len=5 限制下用短譯『杜普』+空白塞滿 5 bytes

translations.en: a ruggedly handsome man, wearing a gleaming suit of armor.
translations.zh: 一名粗獷英挺的男子，身披一襲閃亮的甲甲。

translations.en: "It's Dupre - sounds like dew pray, remember?"
translations.zh: 「是杜普雷——聽起來像『朝露之禱』，記得吧？」

translations.note: @job keyword；len=3 限制下單字『業』+空白

translations.en: "Why, questing, of course! We've been on many a @quest together, you and I."
translations.zh: 「當然是闖蕩@quest（試煉）啦！咱倆可一同經歷過不少試煉哩。」

translations.en: "Yes, you've gone on some really fine ones."
translations.zh: 「是啊，兄弟，你可幹過幾樁漂亮的活兒。」

translations.en: "When you're not around I have to settle for rescuing @damsels, finding @grails, and the like."
translations.zh: 「你不在時，我只好將就著去解救@damsels（佳人）、尋找@grails（聖杯）之類的勾當。」

translations.en: "Some of them are pretty eager to show their @gratitude, if you know what I mean..."
translations.zh: 「她們之中可有幾位，急著要向我表達@gratitude（謝意）呢，你明白我的意思吧……」

translations.en: "Wink wink, nudge nudge, say no more..."
translations.zh: 「眨眼示意，戳一下肋骨，不必多說……」
translations.note: Monty Python 致敬，寫入 riddles

translations.en: "Lord British likes to keep grails around to use at his @banquets, but he's always losing them."
translations.zh: 「不列顛王愛在@banquets（宴會）上拿聖杯擺場面，可他老是把那玩意兒搞丟。」

translations.note: 兩個 keyword (lord+brit 連起來指 Lord British)

translations.en: "He'll throw us a fine feast if you can deal with the @gargoyle invasion somehow."
translations.zh: 「兄弟，你若能想法子收拾@gargoyle（魔像）族的入侵，他必設盛宴款待咱們。」

translations.note: 兩個 keyword；len=9 限制下縮為『魔像』『侵』+空白塞滿；keyword 前綴匹配仍有效

translations.en: "They may be the toughest threat we've ever faced.
translations.zh: 「彼輩或許是咱們此生所遇最棘手的勁敵。
translations.note: 軍人腔，注意原文無結尾引號

translations.en: "I've been with you since the start of this quest, haven't I?"
translations.zh: 「老朋友，這趟試煉打從一開始我便隨你同行，不是嗎？」

translations.en: "Lord British gave me strict orders not to leave your side until this quest is complete."
translations.zh: 「不列顛王嚴令在身——這趟試煉未了之前，我不得離你左右半步。」

translations.en: "Besides, you know how I hate to miss a good quest."
translations.zh: 「再說，你也清楚，好試煉我可從不肯錯過。」
「拜託，咱們別再提鴨子的事了……」
translations.note: Ultima 系列梗，Dupre 怕鴨子
@bye keyword；len=3 限制下用『別』+空白；keyword 前綴匹配仍有效

translations.en: "Yes, enough chit chat. Let's go find some action!"
translations.zh: 「好啦，閒話夠多了。走，咱們找場硬仗去！」

riddles_additions.en: It's Dupre - sounds like dew pray, remember?
riddles_additions.zh: 是杜普雷——聽起來像『朝露之禱』，記得吧？
riddles_additions.ref: Dupre / dew pray 英語諧音雙關
riddles_additions.strategy: 音譯保留人名『杜普雷』，諧音改寫為意境相近的中文短語『朝露之禱』

riddles_additions.en: Wink wink, nudge nudge, say no more...
riddles_additions.zh: 眨眼示意，戳一下肋骨，不必多說……
riddles_additions.ref: Monty Python's Flying Circus sketch 致敬
riddles_additions.strategy: 直譯動作 + 保留『不必多說』暗示語氣

riddles_additions.en: Please, let's not talk about ducks...
riddles_additions.zh: 拜託，咱們別再提鴨子的事了……
riddles_additions.ref: Ultima V 系列梗：Dupre 怕鴨子

translator_notes: Dupre 採『豪邁兄弟兵』口吻。本版修正 5 處 byte overflow：(1) offset 2 '杜普雷'(6) → '杜普 '(5)，避免人名顯示但保 byte；(2) offset 75 移除「」，'何事，$P？'(10) 剛好等於 len；(3) offset 145 'job' 譯為單字『業 '(3)，可能稍弱但 byte 對齊；(4) offset 806 '魔像,侵  '(9)，keyword 仍前綴匹配 garg/inva；(5) offset 1150 'bye' 譯為『別 '(3)。所有 zh_bytes ≤ len 確認。@quest 譯為『試煉』與 glossary 既有 'Avatar's quest=聖者試煉' 一致。lord,brit 兩個 keyword 共指 Lord British，譯文合併為單一『不列顛王』。注意 offset 816 字串原文末尾無結尾引號，譯文保留不加閉引號以對齊。
